subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Most Great Horizon, and the Lord of Destiny addresseth thee, saying: Glorified art Thou, O my God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاز کتابک فی المنظر الاکبر و یخاطبک مالک القدر و یقول قولی سبحانک اللهم یا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
